description_long: This object is a rectangular, ornately decorated wooden box with the appearance of a large, antique book. The cover is a rich, reddish-brown color with a textured leather-like finish, adorned with gold filigree patterns along the edges and corners. The sides mimic the look of aged, stacked pages, giving the illusion of a closed tome. The spine features three raised bands and a geometric gold design, enhancing its classic, vintage aesthetic. The object is solid and compact, with no visible openings, handles, or transparent panels. Its design suggests it could serve as a decorative storage box or a disguised cabinet in an urban setting, such as a themed café, library, or boutique.
description: A decorative wooden box styled as an antique book, featuring gold filigree and a textured, leather-like cover with faux page edges. The object is solid, compact, and visually striking.
description_view_0: The front view shows the faux page edges and the ornate gold filigree on the cover, emphasizing the book-like appearance.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the thickness of the object and the detailed gold corner decorations on the cover.
description_view_2: The spine view displays three raised bands and a geometric gold design, reinforcing the illusion of a classic book spine.
description_view_3: The opposite angled side view mirrors the other side, showing the faux page edges and ornate cover corners.
